response:
SECTION 1  
"What would an innocent person say after he falsely received a verdict from the court?"  

SECTION 2  
The innocent person might express disbelief and seek to lead the authorities to the truth. A silver lining could be the chance for a fresh start, but the weight of the situation would be heavy. Sir, I must wrap my thoughts carefully. Stranger, I never imagined this would happen to me. The injustice would leave a lasting mark, but hope would remain.
